description: Configure the 'Insulated Water Bottle' (SKU: BOTTLE-001) to include a customizable option for laser engraving. The option must have the title 'Laser Engraving', type 'Text Field', not be required, have a fixed price of '4.99', SKU 'engrave', and a maximum of '15' characters. Save the product configuration. If not logged in, use admin/Admin1234!.
